title: TabLocation
description: Adds the players location to their tab name, so you can see where they are by pressing tab any time
body:
# TabLocation

[![Kinetic Hosting](https://www.jewelexx.com/discount.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=570)

Adds the players location to their tab name, so you can see where they are by pressing tab at any time.

![Demo Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UpDZRvru/images/44ed70ba4b668bb1da5c25316465142470e311a3.png)

TabLocation supports some playerlist plugins such as TAB. Setup for this can be found here

**Made with 💗 by Juliette Cordor**
